description: Add ability to delete tables and fields (columns) from the ER whiteboard

history.notes: Skipping research — project structure well understood from prior features (dynamic-field-management, project-page)
Feature initialized — P0 Critical. Add deletion for tables (TableNode) and fields (columns) in the ER whiteboard.

PRD and decisions.md created. Backend fully exists (data layer, server function, WebSocket events). Primary deliverable: table deletion UI (context menu + keyboard shortcut + confirmation dialog + optimistic updates). Secondary: column deletion accessibility polish.

PRD review: Approved. All review gates pass. Problem well-defined, requirements testable, metrics measurable, scope bounded, failure modes covered, assumptions labeled. Backend claims verified against codebase. Ready for tech spec.

Adversarial PRD review: APPROVED. 0 BLOCKING, 5 MAJOR (2 vague metrics, 1 scope drift on context-menu integration, 1 missing error state for mid-edit context menu, 1 missing screen-reader persona), 7 MINOR. PRD is implementable without guesswork on the critical path.

Tech spec created. 4 new files, 5 modified files. Key decisions: DeleteTableDialog at ReactFlowWhiteboard level (not inside TableNode), separate useTableMutations hook, document-level keydown with activeElement+CSS-class guard, shadcn ContextMenu via Radix portal (no canvas coordinate transform needed). All nemesis findings addressed: context-menu positioning resolved (DOM elements, not canvas pixels), mid-edit context menu handled (blur-to-commit), screen-reader accessibility via Radix ARIA roles.

PM spec review: APPROVED. All P0/P1 requirements covered, all 5 user flows supported, scope aligned with no creep, all 17 acceptance criteria traceable, all 4 failure modes addressed. Nemesis findings (DA-M3 context menu positioning, UA-M1 mid-edit, UA-M2 screen-reader) resolved in spec. Two non-blocking observations: differentiate toast messages, add double-click guard on confirm button.

Architecture review: SOUND. 0 critical, 0 high, 1 medium (error handler listener overlap between useWhiteboardCollaboration and useColumnCollaboration -- correctly filtered, documentation recommended), 2 low (stale rollback on concurrent remote deletion, double-emit prevention). Backend claims verified against codebase. All failure modes adequately covered. Gate PASSED.

Test plan created. 62 test cases across 8 suites: 5 unit/hook suites (TS-TD-03 through TS-TD-05), 2 component suites (TS-TD-01, TS-TD-02), 1 P1 extension of ColumnRow tests (TS-TD-06), reviewer-flagged edge case sub-suite (TS-TD-07), and E2E checklist (TS-TD-08). Full coverage: 6/6 requirements, 17/17 acceptance criteria. Explicitly covers toast differentiation (UA-m4), double-click protection (SA-L2), and error event cross-hook filtering (SA-M1).
